The AI Office Manager for Trades & Services

Not Just an AI Receptionist
Your Entire Front Office!

Sophiie answers calls, books jobs, send quotes & invoices, smart schedules, dispatches your team, manages jobs and follows up with customers.

Get Started Chat to Sophiie
No credit card needed 307k+ calls answered

Receive a phone call
from Sophiie

🇦🇺

No credit card required. No obligation. Just results.

What Can Sophiie Run
Your Entire Office?

Sophiie takes care of the day-to-day reception tasks, making life easier for you and your team.

Lead Capturing Pro

She gathers essential details from callers, like names, contact info, and service needs, so you never miss an opportunity.

Real-Time Call Summaries

Sophiie sends detailed summaries straight to your inbox or CRM, so you always know what's happening.

Efficient Call Handling

Whether it's booking appointments, answering FAQs, or taking messages, Sophiie gets it done without breaking a sweat.

Smart Call Transfers

Sophiie seamlessly routes callers to the right person, team, or department. No confusion, no delays.

Fast and Friendly Responses

Sophiie drafts emails with lightning speed, customised to reflect your brand's unique tone and style.

Writes Like Magic

Tell Sophiie what you want to say, and she'll craft the perfect email for you--no fuss, no hassle.

Knowledge-Based Replies

Sophiie taps into your business's knowledge base to deliver accurate, informed responses.

Attachment Library

Upload frequently used documents, and Sophiie will include them in emails as needed.

Write Smarter, Not Harder

Use Sophiie's AI to draft professional, friendly, or casual replies tailored to your brand.

Keep Everything in One Place

Manage all your text conversations directly from your Sophiie dashboard.

Save Time with Suggestions

Sophiie's AI suggests responses based on the conversation, making it easy to reply faster.

Customised Messaging

Add your personal touch to AI-drafted texts to ensure every reply feels authentic.

Answering FAQs

Visitors get instant answers to common questions, from pricing to service details.

Booking Appointments

Sophiie can guide customers through the booking process seamlessly.

Collecting Enquiries

Capture leads by gathering names, emails, and service needs in real-time.

Redirecting Complex Queries

When a human touch is needed, Sophiie flags enquiries for your team to follow up.

Track Job Details

View all job-related information in one place, including descriptions, history, and allocated team members.

Status Updates

Easily update and track job statuses, such as pending, in progress, or completed.

Scheduled Times

Keep your calendar organised with clearly displayed job schedules.

Job-Specific Reminders

Stay on top of deadlines and follow-ups with custom reminders for each job.

Centralised Customer Hub

Keep all your customer details in one easy-to-access location.

Call, Email, or Text

Reach out to your customers directly from the dashboard without jumping between apps.

Detailed Notes

Record important details from conversations or meetings to ensure nothing gets forgotten.

Set Reminders

Stay on top of follow-ups, appointments, and deadlines with Sophiie's built-in reminder system.

24/7

Availability

Sophiie answers calls and enquiries instantly, ensuring your business never misses an opportunity—even after hours.

10,000

Calls at Once

No more busy lines! Sophiie can handle up to 10,000 calls simultaneously, keeping customers happy and engaged.

90%

Faster Response Time

Sophiie handles enquiries, providing quick answers and boosting customer satisfaction.

Connect with the
tools you already use

ServiceM8, Xero, Google Calendar and more — run your entire business from one place.

Invoice Sent

✓ Paid

Job Scheduled

✓ Confirmed

Job Booked

✓ Synced

the phone live

Seamless Communication & Smart Workflow Automation for Businesses

Streamline communication, automate tasks, and stay organised with Sophiie. ensuring efficiency, professionalism, and seamless workflow management.

Learn More

Never Miss a Call

Sophiie ensures every patient's enquiry is handled, even during peak hours.

Save Time

Automate routine tasks like appointment scheduling and FAQs, freeing your staff to focus on care.

Enhance Professionalism

Provide a consistent, high-quality experience for every patient interaction.

Stay Organised

Centralise patient details, call summaries, and schedules in one easy-to-use system.

Tailored AI-Powered Solutions
for Every Service Industry

AI Tools for Electricians

AI solutions that help electricians respond instantly to urgent fault calls, automate scheduling, and capture more high-value jobs.

AI for Plumbers

AI for plumbers that captures emergency calls instantly, automates job scheduling, and helps you secure more work.

AI for HVAC Business

AI tools that help HVAC technicians answer calls instantly, manage bookings, and respond faster to urgent jobs.

AI Tools for Landscaping

AI solutions that help landscapers secure more bookings, manage scheduling, and respond faster to client inquiries.

AI Tools & Solutions for Carpenters

AI solutions designed to help carpenters automate calls, manage bookings, and stay organised while taking on more high-value jobs.

AI for Cleaning Business

AI tools that help cleaning businesses secure more bookings, automate inquiries, and stay organised with faster job scheduling.

AI for Painters

AI-powered solutions that help painters manage calls, schedule jobs faster, and stay fully booked with less admin.

AI Tools for Roofing Companies

AI tools that help roofing contractors capture urgent calls, book inspections faster, and streamline job management.

AI Tools for Concrete Specialists

AI for concreters that automates calls, manages schedules, and helps you secure more jobs without the admin overload.

AI Tools for Fencing Contractors

AI-powered tools that help fencing contractors handle inquiries faster, streamline quotes, and keep projects on schedule.

AI Tools for Fire Service Ops

AI tools that support fire service contractors with instant call answering, job scheduling, and improved compliance workflows.

AI Tools for Flooring Specialists

AI that helps flooring specialists manage client inquiries, book jobs faster, and streamline operations from quote to installation.

AI Receptionist for Handyman Services

AI tools for handymen and property maintenance pros to automate calls, capture more jobs, and simplify scheduling.

AI tools for Plasterers

AI tools for plasterers to handle calls, manage bookings, and keep jobs running smoothly without admin delays.

AI Tools for Pool Cleaners

AI tools that help pool maintenance specialists automate client communication, streamline bookings, and manage recurring jobs.

AI for Bricklaying Contractors

Boost your bricklaying business with AI that handles calls, scheduling, quotes, and job management.

AI Tools & Solutions for Arborists

AI tools that help arborists manage bookings, answer calls instantly, and schedule tree work faster.

AI for Builders

AI-powered tools that help builders streamline calls, manage job schedules, and stay responsive to clients.

Build Trust and Efficiency with Sophiie

Sophiie handles all enquiries and eliminates admin tasks like follow-ups and scheduling, keeping your business efficient and stress-free.

From the news

The latest industry news, interviews, technologies, and resources.

View all posts

Get Landscaping Invoices Paid Faster with AI Follow-Ups

Stop spending your weekends chasing unpaid bills instead of quoting new jobs.

AI Invoice Follow-Up for Electricians: The Key to Scalable Cash Flow

Securing consistent cash flow no longer requires manual payment chase; implementing an AI invoice follow-up system provides a professional, automated solution.

Frequently asked
questions

Find quick answers to common questions about how Sophiie AI works.

Sophiie can either ring your phone first and answer only if you miss the call, or pick up instantly, depending on what works best for your business. This ensures every caller receives a prompt, professional response, whether you're available or not.
Absolutely! Sophiie is available 24/7, so your business stays open even when you're off the clock. She never takes a sick day, never goes on holiday, and always answers calls: day or night, rain, hail, or shine!
If Sophiie doesn't have an answer, she records the enquiry and sends it to you for review. You can then add the response to her knowledge base, so next time a customer asks the same question, Sophiie will know exactly how to answer.
Sophiie is trained with a knowledge base and follows pre-set responses based on your business needs. You can customise her answers anytime to ensure she provides accurate information. Once trained, she never forgets and delivers the correct response every time.
Yes! Sophiie is designed for any service-based industry, including trades, medical, legal, finance, automotive, health & wellness, and more. She adapts to your business needs with custom responses tailored to your services.
Yes! Sophiie can handle up to 10,000 calls simultaneously, ensuring no customer is ever left waiting. Whether it's one call or a thousand, Sophiie answers instantly, so your business never misses an opportunity.

Ready to Transform Your Business with Sophiie?

Let Sophiie handle your calls and schedules with professionalism and care. Focus on your patients while Sophiie takes care of the admin.
